overview.description: Clinically validated and certified AI solution for faster and more accurate interpretation of medical imaging
overview.description_long: Carebot is a Czech technology startup focused on AI in healthcare. Their tool acts as a doctor's 'third eye' – automatically detecting suspicious findings on medical images, supporting early detection of serious oncological and other diseases. Products include AI CXR (chest X-ray), AI Bones (fracture detection), AI Mammography, AI Head CT, AI Lungs CT, and Bone Age measurement. Certified as a medical device under EU MDR IIa. Expanded portfolio branded as 'Horizon by Carebot'.
overview.tagline: AI as a standard of healthcare

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in June 2021 by Matěj Misař (media background) and Daniel Kvak (AI researcher), combining clinical expertise and data science to build AI-assisted medical image interpretation tools.

key_milestones.event: Founded as Carebot s.r.o. in Prague (June 3, 2021)
AI Bones module obtained MDR IIa CE certification as a medical device
Announced new investment round and international license for European expansion
Partnership with Bristol-Myers Squibb to combat lung cancer through AI early detection
Launched Horizon by Carebot — comprehensive AI solution portfolio for hospitals
Presented new clinical evidence at ECR 2026

awards: MDR IIa CE Certification for AI Bones
EU National Recovery Plan grant recipient

metadata.notes: Founded June 3, 2021 (Czech ARES IČO: 10898263). Address: Holečkova 3150/25b, Smíchov, Praha 5. Daniel Kvak referred to as CEO in BMS partnership press release (2024) despite being listed as CTO on about-us page — possible title change. Employee range is inferred from company size/age. Website uses Framer (JavaScript-rendered), limiting data extraction.
